international_summit.title: International Summit
international_summit.text: World leaders are watching your performance. Choose your approach:

host_lavish.result: The summit was impressive but expensive. International prestige gained.

modest_meeting.result: A reasonable diplomatic approach. Modest costs, modest gains.

skip.result: You avoided the summit. Saved money but damaged international relations.

economic_crisis.title: Economic Crisis
economic_crisis.text: A financial crisis hits the nation. How do you respond?

stimulus.result: The stimulus worked! Economy stabilized and public confidence restored.

bailouts.result: Businesses recovered but people felt abandoned during the crisis.

free_market.result: The crisis deepened. Only the military appreciated your 'tough' stance.

natural_disaster.title: Natural Disaster
natural_disaster.text: A major earthquake strikes the capital. Emergency response needed:

full_response.result: Swift response saved lives. The people are grateful for your leadership.

basic_relief.result: Adequate response provided. Situation managed without major issues.

minimal.result: Poor response caused suffering. Only businesses benefited from reduced spending.
